title: UDP Plants
description: A simple and lightweight mod that adds more flowers and plants to your world, for more ways to obtain dye colours, potion ingredients and plant decor!
body:
# What is the **UDP Plants** mod?
Have you ever wanted more flowers and plants? Well, this mod got you covered.
UDP Plants adds a bunch of unique flowers that grow all around your world that encourage exploration to obtain all plants. Some plants can be made into dyes, while others can be used as potion ingredients.
Make sure to check out my other mods as well. :)
Thanks!

# Plants
## Mushrooms
These mushrooms do not need certain light levels to spawn.
### Lush Mushroom
Generates in mushroom fields and in jungles. It can be used to make a potion of haste.

### Morels Mushroom
Generates in dark forests, all old-growth biomes, and jungles. It can be used to make brown dye.

### Lush Brown Mushroom
Generates in mushroom fields, dark forests, all old-growth biomes, and jungles. It can be used to make brown mushrooms

### Button Mushrooms
Generates in dark forests, all old-growth biomes, forests, and jungles. It can be used to make potions of resistance.

#Flat Top Mushroom
Generates like classic red mushrooms.

## New Grass Types 
All grass types act exactly like vanilla grass, dropping seeds occasionally.
### Cave Grass and Cave Bramble
Generates underground in caves. It can be used to make sticks.

### Frosted Grass and Snowy Grass
Generates in cold biomes.

### Sandy Grass and Dry Grass
Generates in hot biomes

### Muddy Grass
Generates in swamps and mangroves.

### Barley
Generates near bodies of water. No uses implemented yet.

## Flowers
All flowers have their own effects when made into Suspicious Stew.
### Viola
Generates like classic flowers. It can be used to make purple dye.

### Geranium
Generates only in forests. It can be used to create blue dye.

### Yellow Dandelion, White Dandelion, and Twin Dandelion
Generates very commonly in grassy biomes. It can be used to make yellow dye and white dye, respectively.

### Rose
Generates in grassy biomes. It can be used to make red dye.

### Fire Tulip and Fire Tulip Bunch
Generates in hot biomes. It can be used to make orange dye.

### Frost Tulip and Frost Tulip Bunch
Generates in colder biomes. It can be used to make light blue dye.

### Green Chrysanthemum
Generates in grassy biomes and forests. It can be used to make green dye.

### Blooming Chrysanthemum
Generates in grassy biomes and forests in hot regions. It can be used to make yellow dye.

### Black Tulip
Generates in the Nether. It can be used to make black dye.

**More on the way! :)**
